name: Focus Runway
description: A quiet focus launcher that trims context switching and starts the next working block cleanly.
short_description: A quiet focus launcher that trims context switching and starts the next working block cleanly.
default_prompt: Use $focus-runway to build a polished macOS menu-bar utility for a quiet focus launcher that trims context switching and starts the next working block cleanly.
audience: People who need less switching and more flow
detail_lines: Starts the next work block with less setup and fewer interruptions.
Keeps just enough context visible to begin quickly.
Prefers one calm action over a stack of settings.
